title: aria nivea var. incisa
intro: Aria nivea var. incisa, also known as the Snowbell Tree or Mountain Snowbell, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae, native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Aria nivea var. incisa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Aria nivea var. incisa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
